top_signals.title: Federal Reserve issues initial findings from its 2025 triennial payments study

top_signals.title: Trump wants delay but E. Jean Carroll wants to gets paid — now: Court filing
top_signals.summary: The Supreme Court on Monday denied a request by President Donald Trump that it review a jury's verdict that he sexually abused and defamed the writer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Exxon to Change Name for First Time in Decades After Redomicile
top_signals.summary: Exxon Mobil Corp. will begin trading as ExxonMobil Holdings Corp. after redomiciling in Texas, the first name change since the Mobil mega merger more than 25 years ago.

top_signals.title: US opts for rolling trade talks instead of renewal of deal with Mexico and Canada
top_signals.summary: Change comes despite poll showing bipartisan backing for USMCA

top_signals.title: Coast Guard Issues Notice on Unmanned Vessels
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Coast Guard (USCG) identified multiple unmanned maritime system (UMS) operations occurring within and near major West Coast port approaches without prior coordination with cognizant Captains of the Port (COTP). The lack of advance notification…

top_signals.title: Over 900 Oracle E-Business instances exposed to ongoing attacks
top_signals.summary: Over 900 Oracle E-Business Suite (EBS) instances have been found exposed online amid ongoing attacks exploiting a critical security flaw. [...]
